title: Contextualized Search
body: Sevenfold draws on your entire workspace to deliver the most relevant results.

title: Interactive Assistant
body: Pair with a project chatbot that keeps converesations grounded in the papers you are reading right now.

title: Intelligent Annotations
body: Discover granular insights in papers sourced from how other researchers have annotated them.

title: Paper Reviewer
body: Automatically get the most detailed reviews of your manuscript to get your project into that top-tier journal.

title: Writing Agent
body: Write your manuscript with a live co-pilot that automates data entry, formatting, outlining, and impact optimization, with a single prompt. Our agent makes the writing process frictionless, with easy revision and iteration workflows.
